title: Live Streamer / Social Media Live Host
description:
Job Title: FULL TIME Live Streamer

Report to: Business Development Head

Location: Singapore & Overseas


Responsibilities

Live streaming career can be both rewarding and fun which allows you to reach and interact with more people across the world! More and more people are turning their love for streaming into a full-time job each and every day. Not to mention you will be working at doing something you enjoy.

Overview this role work is focusing to create engaging content and professional product presentation that aim to establish viewer's engagement and interest in following, buying and awareness of channels, products and brands presented.

• Your role as a Key opinion leader (KOL) / Influencer, passionate in sharing and promoting products what you love to viewers.

• Able to host and communicate face to face with the camera in LIVE sessions. Be proficient in interacting with the audience and keep them entertained.

• Attending to queries and lead the overall flow of the live stream in a brisk and lively mode.

• Involve in broadcast/live stream process, including scheduling, planning, and marketing.

• Develop creative ways to enhance and improve production workflow.

• Strive to achieve target, improve viewers' engagement and experience.

• Constantly updated on the latest marketing trends and happenings.

• Perform other ad-hoc duties, projects, and initiatives as assigned and when required.


Opportunities/Progression


Overseas Opportunities: There are tons of overseas opportunities and the potential to change the landscape of Livestreaming locally or overseas.


Career path: Live streaming is a recent media phenomenon that has promoted many new career possibilities. If you enjoy entertaining and interacting with people, then becoming a streamer is absolutely worth it. The audience for streaming is going to continue to grow into the future. If you fancy a career as a live streamer, now is the time to go for it. You could become the next streamer millionaire.



Requirement

· Excellent communication and collaboration skills to present well and explain.

· Able to travel overseas in the short notice. (each trip around 10-14 days)

· Experience in social live streaming as a host or have attended some Live streaming training a plus.

· Passionate about the potential of social live commerce in the new digital retail, and wanted to seize the opportunity to learn, excel and be part of it.

· Fun, energetic, creative, confident and presentable in presenting, with positive and likable attitude.

· Keen interest of Luxury / Fashion / Lifestyle / Beauty / Mom & Kids products and open to explore learning new product categories.

· Enjoy working in a fast-paced environment, achieving as a team, sharing successes and growth together.

· Bilingual is a highly preferred

· Full time only



About us

LiveCommerce Entertainment – a B2B Marketplace connecting Brands and Live Streamers to Start Live Selling on FB and IG Live. Live selling on FB/IG became a new way for people to stay engaged and entertained as they tuned in to Live Selling shows and connected and bonded with other viewers and hosts of the live shows.

Our mission is to Excite & Entertain by providing our customers Live shopping entertainment! We aim to build a B2B marketplace platform for brands and Live streamers that will dominate social commerce in Asia. Our company values continuous learning, inquisitiveness, being versatile and adaption as well as creating an exciting work environment.

postedCompany.description:
We Excite, We Entertain, We believe we build a B2B marketplace platform for brands and Livestreamers that will dominate social commerce in Asia. 


We believes in being humble, defying the odds and living life to the fullest.
postedCompany.name: LIVECOMMERCE ENTERTAINMENT PTE. LTD.
